expectations.text: The agent correctly identifies M=512, N=768, K=1024 from the matrix dimensions described
expectations.evidence: strategy.json correctly sets M=512, N=768, K=1024 derived from A[512x1024] x B[1024x768]

expectations.text: The strategy correctly identifies that no padding is needed (all dims already in ALLOWED lists)
expectations.evidence: strategy.json sets padding_needed=false, pad_impl=none, all padded dims equal input dims

expectations.text: The strategy block includes dtype: i8 or int8
expectations.evidence: dtype set to 'int8' and dtype_key 'i8' in strategy.json

expectations.text: The strategy source is one of: hashmap_27, sorted_first_fit, preprocessed_map, fallback
Phase 0 reads from the knowledge base and profiling data
expectations.evidence: No Phase 0 in baseline — did not read knowledge base or profiling data. Latency estimate is analytic (2 TOPS assumption) rather than from actual profile.

expectations.text: The agent completes all 5 phases or explains clearly why a phase was skipped
expectations.evidence: Baseline has no phase structure — only produced strategy.json and summary.txt, no analysis or memory update phases.
